title: Daewoo Essentials Long Slot Toaster, 4 Slice With Browning Controls And Cancel Function, Compact Design For 4 Slices Of Bread In Two Slots
features: 4-SLICE CAPACITY WITH 2 EXTRA-LONG SLOTS – Designed to accommodate up to four standard slices or two longer artisan-style breads, baguettes, or oversized bagels, making it versatile for all your toasting needs so you can enjoy perfectly toasted results

SPACE-SAVING,COMPACT DESIGN – Perfect for small kitchens or crowded countertops, this toaster’s slim, space-saving design offers high performance without taking up too much space, fitting neatly into any kitchen setup while delivering great toasting power

CUSTOMIZABLE BROWNING CONTROLS – Tailor toasting to your perfection with adjustable browning settings. Whether you prefer a light golden crisp or a deeper, crunchier texture, easily adjust to your preferred level for consistent

CONVENIENT CANCEL FUNCTION – In total control with just one press! The handy cancel button lets you stop the toasting cycle at any moment, preventing over-toasting and ensuring your bread, bagels, or pastries come out exactly how you want them

REMOVABLE CRUMB TRAY FOR EASY CLEANING – Keep your kitchen tidy with minimal effort. The removable crumb tray catches crumbs making cleanup quick and simple. Just slide it out, empty, and your toaster is ready for the next use

specifications_table.Special Features: ‎4 Slice, 2 Long slots, Compact, Browning controls, Cancel function, Removable crumb tray
